# Dashboards Fixture Notes

This fixture set is synthetic and source-traceable. It is shaped by
`docs/opensearch-dashboards-gap-analysis.md`, especially the data-view field
capabilities path, msearch route, cluster stats telemetry path, and cat plugin
compatibility checks from the pinned OpenSearch Dashboards 3.7.0 baseline.

It proves fixture-level Dashboards-shaped compatibility only. It is not a live
OpenSearch Dashboards support claim.
